body:
goodtransgirl:

The dreary day and the almost white noise quality of the rain pelting against the windows and roof, give the world a pocket dimension quality, as if for now, nothing exists outside the small home we share together. My nose is delighted with the delightful scents of brewing coffee and freshly baked bread cooling on the counter for later. We awkwardly dance around each other in the too small kitchen, often going for the same thing at the same time or standing in front of the drawer or cabinet the other needs to get into, but there is no frustration or annoyance, just smiles and laughs each time as we impede each other’s progress again and again.

I finally concede, “The kitchen is yours!” and give her a quick peck on the lips before stealing my coffee and retreating to the couch. She finishes up her own activities in the kitchen shortly after, sitting beside me on the love seat. And for a moment, I want to stay in that spot forever, just feeling the light current that runs between us in each spot where we touch, making my chest fill with warmth. We sit and jabber about anything and everything that crosses our minds, and every time I look into her eyes, the pocket dimension that houses only us, seems to get a touch warmer.

At some point, the conversation hits a lull and she leans in and oh so gently presses her lips against my own, it’s slow and soft, and we kiss with a gentle passion that seems to make this not just a pocket dimension for us, but a place where time stops and the rain almost seems to cheer us on.

After we finally break the kiss, I rest my forehead against hers, close my eyes, and wish deeply that this truly was a side universe that was only ours. It is such an ordinary moment, but she makes it so much more than that.

I know in time reality will assert itself and this little bubble that is just ours will pop, but we have a lifetime of rainy afternoons, quiet rituals, and gentle moments ahead of us. And I can’t help but smile at the thought that we have so many more of these wonderful moments ahead…
